page_metadata.biotools__summary: Takes a nucleotide sequence as input and estimates off-target effects caused by dsRNA (double-stranded RNA) employed in RNAi studies. It can be used either to verify previously designed dsRNA sequences, or to design off-target minimized dsRNAs.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Takes a nucleotide sequence as input and estimates off-target effects caused by dsRNA (double-stranded RNA) employed in RNAi studies. It can be used either to verify previously designed dsRNA sequences, or to design off-target minimized dsRNAs.
